features.featureTitle: Design and apply a cohesive visual theme across the entire site inspired by a dark, modern AI-tech aesthetic: deep charcoal/near-black backgrounds (#0D0D0D, #141414), vivid electric green accents (#00FF87 or similar), clean sans-serif typography, subtle glassmorphism cards, and smooth gradient highlights. This palette and style must be consistent on every page.

Build a responsive landing page (Home) with: a hero section featuring the SnapCut AI brand name/logo area, a compelling headline ('Remove Backgrounds in One Click'), a short sub-headline, and a prominent CTA button ('Try It Free — Upload Now') that scrolls to the upload tool. Include a 'How It Works' section (3 steps: Upload → AI Removes Background → Download), a Features section highlighting 6 key features (one-click removal, drag-and-drop, multiple formats, transparent PNG output, fast processing, secure handling), a Target Audience section, and a footer with brand name and nav links.

Build a fully functional background removal tool section/page with: a drag-and-drop upload zone that also supports click-to-browse; accepted formats JPG, PNG, WEBP; a file size limit of 10MB; an animated processing state after upload; a side-by-side or toggle before/after preview of the original and result images; a 'Remove Background' action button; and a 'Download PNG' button that triggers download of the result as a transparent PNG. The background removal must be simulated on the frontend using a canvas-based approach (remove white/near-white pixels or apply a chroma-key style effect) since no external AI API is available in this environment.

Build a Pricing page accessible via the navigation bar with three plan tiers: (1) Free — 5 removals/day, standard quality, no credit card required; (2) Pro — $9.99/month, unlimited removals, HD quality, priority processing; (3) Business — $29.99/month, unlimited removals, API access, bulk processing, dedicated support. Each plan card must show the plan name, price, feature list, and a CTA button. Highlight the Pro plan as 'Most Popular'. Include a pay-per-use note: 'Need more? Buy credits — $0.10 per image.'

Add a persistent top navigation bar with: the SnapCut AI logo/brand mark on the left, navigation links ('Home', 'Tool', 'Pricing', 'FAQ'), and a 'Get Started' CTA button on the right. The navbar must be sticky (fixed on scroll) and collapse into a hamburger menu on mobile.

Add a basic FAQ section/page with at least 6 common questions and answers covering: what formats are supported, how long processing takes, whether images are stored, what the free plan includes, how to upgrade, and data privacy/deletion policy.

Store a simple usage counter in the Motoko backend actor to track total background removal operations processed by the platform (anonymous aggregate count only — no user data). Expose a query method `getTotalProcessed() : async Nat` and an update method `recordProcessed() : async ()`. Display the live count on the landing page hero section as a social proof stat (e.g., 'X images processed').

Generate and render the following static image assets: a SnapCut AI hero background (abstract dark tech texture with subtle green light streaks), a brand logo mark (stylized scissors with a green AI spark), and three illustrative icons for the 'How It Works' steps (upload icon, AI processing icon, download icon). Serve all images from `frontend/public/assets/generated`.
